channel.title: Wasil Zafar — Physical sciences
channel.description: Latest physical sciences articles from Wasil Zafar

item.title: Part 1: Prerequisites & Foundations — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Build the essential mathematical and physics foundations needed to understand Einstein
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 2: Crisis of Classical Physics — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Discover why classical physics failed at high speeds — the Michelson-Morley experiment, the aether crisis, and the failure of Galilean relativity that led to Einstein
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 3: Special Relativity — Theory of Relativity
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 4: Spacetime & Geometry — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Explore Minkowski spacetime — the 4D geometric framework unifying space and time. Learn spacetime diagrams, light cones, worldlines, proper time, the spacetime interval ds², and four-vectors.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 5: General Relativity — Theory of Relativity
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 6: Cosmology — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Explore cosmology through the lens of General Relativity — the expanding universe, Big Bang theory, Friedmann equations, dark matter, dark energy, and the Cosmic Microwave Background radiation.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 7: Experimental Verification — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Explore a century of experimental verification of Einstein
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 8: Mathematical Relativity — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Master the mathematical machinery of General Relativity — tensor calculus, differential geometry, Christoffel symbols, Riemann curvature tensor, and exact solutions including Schwarzschild and Kerr metrics.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 9: Advanced Topics & Frontiers — Theory of Relativity
item.description: Explore the cutting edge of physics — quantum gravity, string theory, wormholes, time travel, Hawking radiation, and the black hole information paradox. Where General Relativity meets its limits.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Part 10: Applications of Relativity — Theory of Relativity
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)

item.title: Theory of Relativity Assessment
item.description: Test your mastery of the Theory of Relativity series. All questions, no time limit, detailed feedback after each answer. This assessment covers all topics from the Theory of Relativity series.
item.author: wasil.zafar@gmail.com (Wasil Zafar)
